name: Beatrect
short_description: Introducing Beatrect the Rhythm Action Game for music lovers and note-slashers both old and new! Slash the notes without complicated rules. Experience a whole new ray-tracing based graphic.
detailed_description:
Introducing Beatrect
the Rhythm Action Game for music lovers and note-slashers both old and new!


Tired of precisely aiming for the notes?
Just wanna enjoy music without overthinking?
Let the music take over, and get your body moving!

Features

■ Beatrect is easy to play!
Jump into the action without complicated rules - Perfect for beginners and casual players!

■ Hone your skills and challenge yourself!
Find your own way to play the levels and move up in the ranks!

■ Get ready for the never-before-seen visuals!
This new ray-tracing based graphic technology will shock and amaze you!

■ Create your own original levels!
Everyone has a chance to be featured on the official levels page!


Play with no hesitation!
Play for the love of music!
